form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (20.45) when fifth over 342m at Angle Park in a Grade 6. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Key chance and should go close.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by a nose over 300m at this track in a handy (16.95), beating Ribery. Will find this a bit tougher, be tough to make an impression against this lot.
